ddls:
CREATE TABLE "detector_types" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detector type */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the detector algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detector algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detector type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detector type was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., detector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_types" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor type */,
  "descriptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor type was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., descriptor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matcher_types" (
  "matcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matcher type */,
  "matcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the matcher algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the matcher algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the matcher type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the matcher type was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., matcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selector_types" (
  "selector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selector type */,
  "selector_name" TEXT /* Name of the selector algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selector algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selector type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selector type was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., selector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector algorithm used */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor algorithm used */,
  "matcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matcher algorithm used */,
  "selector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selector algorithm used */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was conducted */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the experiment */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensors used in the experiment */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensors used in the experiment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed environment conditions during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detector_types ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_selector_id FOREIGN KEY ("selector_id") REFERENCES selector_types ("selector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_matcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("matcher_id") REFERENCES matcher_types ("matcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptor_types ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ttc_estimations" (
  "ttc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TTC estimation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the TTC estimation belongs to */,
  "ttc_lidar" REAL /* Estimated TTC value from the LIDAR sensor */,
  "ttc_camera" REAL /* Estimated TTC value from the camera sensor */,
  "estimation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the TTC was estimated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (LIDAR or Camera) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the TTC estimation */,
  "algorithm_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version used */,
  "sensor_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the sensor during the TTC estimation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ttc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ttc_estimations_algorithm_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ttc_estimations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sensor data belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (LIDAR or Camera) */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sensor data file */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the sensor data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor data was uploaded */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor used */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed conditions under which the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the performance metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the algorithm combination */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the algorithm combination */,
  "computational_time" REAL /* Computational time taken by the algorithm combination */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the algorithm combination */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the algorithm combination */,
  "algorithm_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., experiment, sensor data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES matcher_types ("matcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES selector_types ("selector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES detector_types ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES descriptor_types ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES detector_types ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES matcher_types ("matcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES selector_types ("selector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES descriptor_types ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, TTC) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  "visualization_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
